title: Reconcile obsolete path leases without weakening exact overlap
goal: Close the live gap exposed by T040: exact path leases must remain fail-closed while their owner still declares the path, but completed or superseded owner work needs an evidence-bound release and reconciliation path so stale path leases do not block unrelated successors until TTL expiry.

acceptance.assertion: A requester cannot bypass an exact path lease merely because processes are absent, the TTL is near expiry or observed current work appears disjoint; unknown or nonterminal owner state remains blocked.

Workspace, task or integration closeout can emit an owner-bound receipt naming obsolete exact leases, terminal evidence and expected lease snapshots; the broker releases only unchanged leases owned by that owner.

A typed reconciliation operation can verify merged/deployed or abandoned owner work, terminal tasks and workspace closeout, then release only explicitly proven obsolete path leases without touching other owner resources.

The non-conflict assessor returns a stable machine-readable distinction between repository-lease assessment, exact path overlap requiring owner release, stale proof and unsupported blocker type instead of a generic validation error.
A different owner receives no release, write or retry authority from lease expiry, process absence, task titles, inferred scope or a non-conflict proof alone.
Agent Workspace and durable-task closeout either release their exact owner leases or retain them with an explicit reason and bounded retention; failed or uncollected work remains fail-closed.

Tests cover terminal owner release, changed lease snapshots, active dirty workspace, failed uncollected workspace, expiry-only attempts, partial release and concurrent reconciliation; a live smoke proves obsolete-path release and continued rejection of a genuine exact overlap.

metadata.observed_failure: grabowski_resource_nonconflict_assess rejected a path blocker with: blocked_resource_key must be a repository lease
metadata.safety_decision: At the original observation, do not force-release or infer permission. T040 could proceed only after the foreign owner had closed its workspace and the exact path lease was released or validly reclaimed owner-bound.
metadata.observed_resolution: T037 later closed with resources_released=true; T040 then acquired the exact generated-context path owner-bound, completed, merged and deployed. T046 remains planned to generalize this safe reconciliation path for future stale exact leases.
